data.title: Home
data.description: Welcome to our Edge Delivery Services site.
data.fullText: This starter site demonstrates custom indexing, metadata-driven retrieval, and full text search.

data.title: Search Setup
data.description: How to configure custom index fields and metadata filters.
data.fullText: Define custom properties in metadata and query with syntax like category:docs or URL params such as meta.category=docs. Full text terms are matched across title, description, body, and tags.

data.title: Platform
data.fullText: Our platform supports high-performance content delivery, metadata indexing, and configurable search experiences.
